LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Raider.description: The Raider Gangs are a loose confederation of bandit groups operating in the wasteland. They are known for their brutal tactics, scavenging, and raiding of settlements. While they often fight among themselves, they can unite against common foes. The Raiders reject the 老旧 world values and instead embrace a survival-of-the-fittest mentality. They are feared and despised by many, but also h老旧 a certain allure for those seeking freedom from the constraints of civilization.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Raider.ideoDescription: Founded on principles of survival and strength, the Raider Gangs believe in taking what they need by force. They reject the 老旧 world's values and embrace a brutal code of conduct where only the strong survive.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Raider.label: Raider Gangs
